descriptions.zh: W3C PROV-O prov:SoftwareAgent(agent-reviewer-2) 关联 prov:Activity(review-exec-842)；actor_id 本地稳定，不复制 OpenAI assistant_id 原生字段。
descriptions.en: W3C PROV-O prov:SoftwareAgent(agent-reviewer-2) associated with prov:Activity(review-exec-842); actor_id locally stable, not copying OpenAI assistant_id native field.
descriptions.ja: PROV-O SoftwareAgent が review Activity に関連する。

labels.ja: LangSmith span を Actor とする

descriptions.zh: LangSmith tool run span 写入 actor_id；span 描述操作 timing 不是责任主体，应保留 TraceSpan 并单独建模 Actor。
descriptions.en: LangSmith tool run span written to actor_id; span describes operation timing not responsible principal; keep TraceSpan and model Actor separately.
descriptions.ja: tool run span は Actor ではない。

descriptions.zh: A2A AgentCard.name=reviewer 是发现文档字段；Moonweave actor_id 是本地 opaque ID；RemoteAgentReference 存 card URL 不复制 name 到 actor_id。
descriptions.en: A2A AgentCard.name=reviewer is discovery document field; Moonweave actor_id is local opaque ID; RemoteAgentReference stores card URL without copying name to actor_id.
descriptions.ja: AgentCard.name と actor_id は別ライフサイクルである。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent, refund_agent] 映射 Actor actor_id=openai-triage-agent、actor_kind=SoftwareActor。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent, refund_agent] maps Actor actor_id=openai-triage-agent, actor_kind=SoftwareActor.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI triage_agent が Actor にマップされる。

labels.ja: OpenAI handoff バインディング

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent] 产生 ActorBinding binding_id=handoff-triage-booking、source_actor=triage_agent、target_scope=booking_agent。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent] produces ActorBinding binding_id=handoff-triage-booking, source_actor=triage_agent, target_scope=booking_agent.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI handoffs が ActorBinding を生成する。

labels.zh: 全局 tools 列表非 Binding
labels.ja: グローバル tools 一覧は Binding ではない

descriptions.zh: Agent tools=[get_weather, read_file] 全局列表无 source/target scope，不是 ActorBinding。
descriptions.en: Agent tools=[get_weather, read_file] global list without source/target scope is not ActorBinding.
descriptions.ja: tools 一覧だけでは ActorBinding にならない。

descriptions.zh: ActorBinding 泛化 actor 间绑定；ActorRoleBinding 绑定 role；ActorCapabilityBinding 绑定 capability；handoff 是 AgentBinding 子类型。
descriptions.en: ActorBinding generalizes inter-actor binding; ActorRoleBinding binds role; ActorCapabilityBinding binds capability; handoff is AgentBinding subtype.
descriptions.ja: Binding 类型は scope によって分離する。

descriptions.zh: ActorBinding binding_id=handoff-triage-booking、source_actor_id=openai-triage-agent、target_actor_id=openai-booking-agent。
descriptions.en: ActorBinding binding_id=handoff-triage-booking, source_actor_id=openai-triage-agent, target_actor_id=openai-booking-agent.
descriptions.ja: handoff-triage-booking ActorBinding を記録する。

labels.ja: MCP filesystem.read ケイパビリティバインディング

descriptions.zh: MCP tools/list 返回 filesystem.read；ActorCapabilityBinding binding_id=cap-fs-read-repo、capability=filesystem.read、scope_ref=repo:moonweave/schema。
descriptions.en: MCP tools/list returns filesystem.read; ActorCapabilityBinding binding_id=cap-fs-read-repo, capability=filesystem.read, scope_ref=repo:moonweave/schema.
descriptions.ja: MCP filesystem.read が repo scope に CapabilityBinding される。

labels.ja: OpenAI tools 配列は CapabilityBinding ではない

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agent tools=[get_weather] 是工具 schema 列表，无 capability+scope 绑定记录，不是 ActorCapabilityBinding。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agent tools=[get_weather] is tool schema list without capability+scope binding record, not ActorCapabilityBinding.
descriptions.ja: tools 配列だけでは CapabilityBinding にならない。

descriptions.zh: ActorCapabilityBinding 记录 actor 在 scope 内可用 capability；ToolServiceActor 是执行服务主体；capability 绑定与 tool 服务 Actor 分离。
descriptions.en: ActorCapabilityBinding records actor capability available within scope; ToolServiceActor is execution service principal; capability binding separated from tool service Actor.
descriptions.ja: CapabilityBinding と ToolServiceActor は分離する。

labels.zh: repo read 能力 scope 实例
labels.ja: repo read ケイパビリティ scope 事例

descriptions.zh: ActorCapabilityBinding binding_id=cap-fs-read-repo、actor_id=openai-weather-agent、capability=filesystem.read、scope_ref=repo:moonweave/schema。
descriptions.en: ActorCapabilityBinding binding_id=cap-fs-read-repo, actor_id=openai-weather-agent, capability=filesystem.read, scope_ref=repo:moonweave/schema.
descriptions.ja: cap-fs-read-repo CapabilityBinding を記録する。

labels.zh: CrewAI Senior Data Researcher 角色绑定
labels.en: CrewAI Senior Data Researcher role binding
labels.ja: CrewAI Senior Data Researcher ロールバインディング

descriptions.zh: CrewAI Agent(role=) 绑定 Task task-61 产生 ActorRoleBinding binding_id=role-researcher-task61、role=Senior Data Researcher、task_id=task-61。
descriptions.en: CrewAI Agent(role=) bound to Task task-61 produces ActorRoleBinding binding_id=role-researcher-task61, role=Senior Data Researcher, task_id=task-61.
descriptions.ja: CrewAI role が Task に ActorRoleBinding される。

labels.ja: OpenAI instructions テキストは RoleBinding ではない

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agent instructions="You are a researcher..." 是自然语言配置，不是 scoped ActorRoleBinding 记录。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agent instructions="You are a researcher..." is natural language config, not scoped ActorRoleBinding record.
descriptions.ja: instructions テキストだけでは RoleBinding にならない。

descriptions.zh: ActorRoleBinding 将 RuntimeRole 绑定到 actor/task scope；RuntimeRole 是角色定义；binding 是 scoped 关联记录。
descriptions.en: ActorRoleBinding binds RuntimeRole to actor/task scope; RuntimeRole is role definition; binding is scoped association record.
descriptions.ja: RuntimeRole 定義と RoleBinding 記録は分離する。

labels.ja: researcher task-61 バインディング事例

descriptions.zh: ActorRoleBinding binding_id=role-researcher-task61、actor_id=crewai-journalist、role_ref=ReviewerRole、scope_ref=task-61。
descriptions.en: ActorRoleBinding binding_id=role-researcher-task61, actor_id=crewai-journalist, role_ref=ReviewerRole, scope_ref=task-61.
descriptions.ja: role-researcher-task61 ActorRoleBinding を記録する。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK Agent(name=, instructions="...", tools=[get_weather]) 映射 AgentActor actor_id=openai-weather-agent、runtime_configuration_ref=cfg:weather-v1。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK Agent(name=, instructions="...", tools=[get_weather]) maps AgentActor actor_id=openai-weather-agent, runtime_configuration_ref=cfg:weather-v1.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI Weather Agent が AgentActor にマップされる。

labels.ja: AgentCard を actor_id に複製

descriptions.zh: A2A AgentCard skills/interfaces 复制进 actor_id 字段；发现文档可撤销，应保留 RemoteAgentReference 类型化引用。
descriptions.en: Copying A2A AgentCard skills/interfaces into actor_id; discovery document can be withdrawn; retain RemoteAgentReference typed reference.
descriptions.ja: AgentCard フィールドの actor_id 複製は拒否する。

descriptions.zh: MCP client 连接 https://tools.example/mcp 是 ToolServiceActor 边界；AgentActor 承担 agent 责任，MCP 是 tool 连接层。
descriptions.en: MCP client connection https://tools.example/mcp is ToolServiceActor boundary; AgentActor bears agent responsibility, MCP is tool connection layer.
descriptions.ja: MCP 接続は ToolServiceActor 境界である。

descriptions.zh: CrewAI Agent(role=, tools=[SerperDevTool()]) 映射 AgentActor actor_id=crewai-journalist、runtime_configuration_ref=cfg:crewai-journalist-v1。
descriptions.en: CrewAI Agent(role=, tools=[SerperDevTool()]) maps AgentActor actor_id=crewai-journalist, runtime_configuration_ref=cfg:crewai-journalist-v1.
descriptions.ja: CrewAI journalist が AgentActor にマップされる。

labels.zh: OpenAI 多 Agent handoff 系统
labels.ja: OpenAI マルチ Agent handoff システム

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 定义 triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent, refund_agent]；AgentSystem system_id=support-agent-prod 拥有 Session 存储与多 Agent 边界。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK defines triage_agent handoffs=[booking_agent, refund_agent]; AgentSystem system_id=support-agent-prod owns Session storage and multi-agent boundary.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI handoffs が AgentSystem 境界を定義する。

labels.zh: 单个 Agent 配置非 System
labels.ja: 単一 Agent 設定は System ではない

descriptions.zh: 单个 Agent(name=, tools=[get_weather]) 配置无 system_id/session store/多 agent 编排，不是 AgentSystem。
descriptions.en: Single Agent(name=, tools=[get_weather]) config without system_id/session store/multi-agent orchestration is not AgentSystem.
descriptions.ja: 単一 Agent 設定は AgentSystem ではない。

descriptions.zh: AgentSystem 是编排与 session 所有权边界；RuntimeEnvironment 是容器/进程/工作目录；系统配置与环境载体分离。
descriptions.en: AgentSystem is orchestration and session ownership boundary; RuntimeEnvironment is container/process/workdir; system config separated from environment carrier.
descriptions.ja: AgentSystem は编排、RuntimeEnvironment は実行環境である。

descriptions.zh: AgentSystem system_id=support-agent-prod、deployment_ref=ecs/support-agent:3、session_store_ref=redis://sessions/support-agent-prod。
descriptions.en: AgentSystem system_id=support-agent-prod, deployment_ref=ecs/support-agent:3, session_store_ref=redis://sessions/support-agent-prod.
descriptions.ja: support-agent-prod AgentSystem デプロイを記録する。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI client.beta.threads.messages.list(thread_id=, order="asc") 返回 role=user/assistant 消息序列，AgentTranscript transcript_id=transcript-18、message_count=18。
descriptions.en: OpenAI client.beta.threads.messages.list(thread_id=, order="asc") returns role=user/assistant message sequence, AgentTranscript transcript_id=transcript-18, message_count=18.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI messages.list が AgentTranscript 対話転写である。

labels.ja: LangSmith run.inputs は Transcript ではない

descriptions.zh: LangSmith run.inputs={"query":"..."} 是 trace 输入预览，不是完整 Thread Messages AgentTranscript。
descriptions.en: LangSmith run.inputs={"query":"..."} is trace input preview, not full Thread Messages AgentTranscript.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith run.inputs は Transcript ではない。

descriptions.zh: AgentTranscript 持久化对话条目；TraceSpan 记录操作 timing；transcript 内容不等于 span attributes。
descriptions.en: AgentTranscript persists dialogue items; TraceSpan records operation timing; transcript content is not span attributes.
descriptions.ja: Transcript は対話、TraceSpan は操作 timing である。

labels.ja: support thread 18 メッセージ事例

descriptions.zh: AgentTranscript transcript_id=transcript-18、thread_id=thread_abc、message_count=18、last_message_at=2026-01-15T10:15:00Z。
descriptions.en: AgentTranscript transcript_id=transcript-18, thread_id=thread_abc, message_count=18, last_message_at=2026-01-15T10:15:00Z.
descriptions.ja: transcript-18 に 18 件メッセージを記録する。

descriptions.zh: A2A Artifact artifactId=a2a-report-a1、name=report、parts=[TextPart, FilePart]、content_digest=sha256:8b1a9953...；PROV-O Entity 由 Execution 生成。
descriptions.en: A2A Artifact artifactId=a2a-report-a1, name=report, parts=[TextPart, FilePart], content_digest=sha256:8b1a9953...; PROV-O Entity generated by Execution.
descriptions.ja: A2A Artifact parts が PROV Entity である。

labels.ja: プロセスハンドルは Artifact ではない

descriptions.zh: ProcessHandle PID=4820 指向 worker 进程，无稳定内容输出与 content_digest，不是 Artifact。
descriptions.en: ProcessHandle PID=4820 points to worker process without stable content output and content_digest, not Artifact.
descriptions.ja: PID は Artifact ではない。

labels.zh: Span event 与 Artifact 边界
labels.ja: Span event と Artifact 境界

descriptions.zh: OTel span.add_event("artifact_uploaded") 报告上传发生；Artifact 内容在独立 Entity 记录；event 是证据，Artifact 是输出。
descriptions.en: OTel span.add_event("artifact_uploaded") reports upload occurrence; Artifact content in independent Entity record; event is evidence, Artifact is output.
descriptions.ja: span event と Artifact Entity は分離する。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Assistants Messages API 返回 assistant role message 文本作为 Run 输出 Artifact artifact_id=openai-message-output-22、media_type=text/plain。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Assistants Messages API returns assistant role message text as Run output Artifact artifact_id=openai-message-output-22, media_type=text/plain.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI assistant message が Artifact 出力である。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI 组织 audit log export 含 event=api_key.created、actor=admin@corp.com、resource=sk-...、timestamp=2026-01-15T09:00:00Z。
descriptions.en: OpenAI organization audit log export includes event=api_key.created, actor=admin@corp.com, resource=sk-..., timestamp=2026-01-15T09:00:00Z.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI audit log export が AuditRecord である。

labels.ja: TraceSpan は AuditRecord ではない

descriptions.zh: OTel TraceSpan name=agent.tool_call 是操作追踪，不是组织级 AuditRecord 合规日志。
descriptions.en: OTel TraceSpan name=agent.tool_call is operation trace, not organization-level AuditRecord compliance log.
descriptions.ja: TraceSpan は AuditRecord ではない。

descriptions.zh: AuditRecord 记录管理/合规事件；AgentTranscript 记录对话内容；audit 不含完整 message body。
descriptions.en: AuditRecord records admin/compliance events; AgentTranscript records conversation content; audit excludes full message body.
descriptions.ja: Audit は管理イベント、Transcript は対話内容である。

labels.zh: API key 轮换审计实例
labels.ja: API key ローテーション監査事例

descriptions.zh: AuditRecord audit_id=audit-301、event_type=api_key.rotated、actor_id=admin@corp.com、recorded_at=2026-01-15T09:30:00Z。
descriptions.en: AuditRecord audit_id=audit-301, event_type=api_key.rotated, actor_id=admin@corp.com, recorded_at=2026-01-15T09:30:00Z.
descriptions.ja: audit-301 API key ローテーション監査を記録する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph checkpointer.put(config, checkpoint, metadata, new_versions) 持久化 checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336、channel_values 与 pending_writes（docs.langchain.com/langgraph/persistence）。
descriptions.en: LangGraph checkpointer.put(config, checkpoint, metadata, new_versions) persists checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336, channel_values, and pending_writes.
descriptions.ja: LangGraph checkpointer.put が checkpoint_id と channel_values を永続化する。

labels.ja: OTel trace は Checkpoint ではない

descriptions.zh: OTel trace export JSON 含 trace_id/span 树但无 channel_values/next/checkpoint tuple，不是 LangGraph Checkpoint。
descriptions.en: OTel trace export JSON has trace_id/span tree but no channel_values/next/checkpoint tuple, not LangGraph Checkpoint.
descriptions.ja: OTel trace は LangGraph Checkpoint ではない。

descriptions.zh: Checkpoint 是存储 tuple；graph.get_state 返回 StateSnapshot 查询视图；put tuple 与 get_state view 角色不同。
descriptions.en: Checkpoint is storage tuple; graph.get_state returns StateSnapshot query view; put tuple and get_state view have different roles.
descriptions.ja: Checkpoint tuple と StateSnapshot クエリ view は役割が異なる。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph PostgresSaver 在 thread_id=thread-1 super-step 后写入 checkpoint，含 pending_writes 支持 HITL interrupt 后 resume。
descriptions.en: LangGraph PostgresSaver writes checkpoint after super-step on thread_id=thread-1 with pending_writes supporting HITL interrupt resume.
descriptions.ja: PostgresSaver checkpoint は HITL resume を支持する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph checkpointer.put(config, checkpoint, metadata, new_versions) 在 super-step 结束捕获 CheckpointCaptureActivity，写入 checkpoint_id 与 channel_values。
descriptions.en: LangGraph checkpointer.put(config, checkpoint, metadata, new_versions) at super-step end captures CheckpointCaptureActivity writing checkpoint_id and channel_values.
descriptions.ja: checkpointer.put が CheckpointCaptureActivity として super-step checkpoint を捕獲する。

labels.zh: 手动 JSON 快照非 CaptureActivity
labels.ja: 手動 JSON スナップショットは CaptureActivity ではない

descriptions.zh: 开发者手动 json.dump(state) 到 /tmp/snap.json 无 checkpointer.put metadata/new_versions，不是 CheckpointCaptureActivity。
descriptions.en: Developer manual json.dump(state) to /tmp/snap.json without checkpointer.put metadata/new_versions is not CheckpointCaptureActivity.
descriptions.ja: 手動 json.dump は CheckpointCaptureActivity ではない。

descriptions.zh: CheckpointCaptureActivity 是写 checkpoint 的 Activity；StateSnapshot 是 get_state 读视图；capture 写、snapshot 读。
descriptions.en: CheckpointCaptureActivity is Activity writing checkpoint; StateSnapshot is get_state read view; capture writes, snapshot reads.
descriptions.ja: Capture は書込 Activity、Snapshot は読取 view である。

labels.ja: super-step checkpoint キャプチャ事例

descriptions.zh: CheckpointCaptureActivity activity_id=cp-capture-31、checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336、thread_id=thread-1、captured_at=2026-01-15T10:00:01Z。
descriptions.en: CheckpointCaptureActivity activity_id=cp-capture-31, checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336, thread_id=thread-1, captured_at=2026-01-15T10:00:01Z.
descriptions.ja: cp-capture-31 が super-step checkpoint を捕獲する。

labels.ja: LangGraph CheckpointSaver ライフサイクル

descriptions.zh: LangGraph CheckpointSaver 对 thread_id=thread-1 执行 put/get 周期：CheckpointCaptureActivity 写 checkpoint，RestoreActivity 读 get_state 恢复。
descriptions.en: LangGraph CheckpointSaver put/get cycle on thread_id=thread-1: CheckpointCaptureActivity writes checkpoint, RestoreActivity reads get_state restore.
descriptions.ja: CheckpointSaver put/get 周期が CheckpointLifecycleActivity である。

labels.ja: S3 backup は CheckpointLifecycleActivity ではない

descriptions.zh: AWS S3 备份 LangGraph DB 是运维备份 Activity，不是 CheckpointSaver put/get 生命周期 Activity。
descriptions.en: AWS S3 backup of LangGraph DB is ops backup Activity, not CheckpointSaver put/get lifecycle Activity.
descriptions.ja: S3 DB 备份は CheckpointLifecycleActivity ではない。

labels.zh: Capture 与 Restore Activity 边界
labels.ja: Capture と Restore Activity 境界

descriptions.zh: CheckpointLifecycleActivity 分组 capture/restore/replay；CheckpointCaptureActivity 与 RestoreActivity 是子 Activity 类型，不可合并为单一 span。
descriptions.en: CheckpointLifecycleActivity groups capture/restore/replay; CheckpointCaptureActivity and RestoreActivity are child Activity types, not merged into single span.
descriptions.ja: Capture/Restore は子 Activity として分離する。

descriptions.zh: PostgresSaver 在 super-step 边界：CheckpointCaptureActivity activity_id=cp-life-31 put checkpoint_id=1f070a87...；随后 RestoreActivity get_state。
descriptions.en: PostgresSaver at super-step boundary: CheckpointCaptureActivity activity_id=cp-life-31 put checkpoint_id=1f070a87...; then RestoreActivity get_state.
descriptions.ja: PostgresSaver super-step 境界で capture/restore 周期を記録する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph interrupt 后 graph.invoke(resume_command, config={configurable:{thread_id:thread-1}}) 从 checkpoint 恢复，产生 CheckpointRestoreEvent checkpoint_id=1f070a87...。
descriptions.en: After LangGraph interrupt, graph.invoke(resume_command, config={configurable:{thread_id:thread-1}}) restores from checkpoint producing CheckpointRestoreEvent checkpoint_id=1f070a87....
descriptions.ja: LangGraph resume が CheckpointRestoreEvent を生成する。

labels.ja: Pod restart は CheckpointRestoreEvent ではない

descriptions.zh: Kubernetes Pod container restart 是 RuntimeEnvironment/Container 生命周期，不是 LangGraph CheckpointRestoreEvent。
descriptions.en: Kubernetes Pod container restart is RuntimeEnvironment/Container lifecycle, not LangGraph CheckpointRestoreEvent.
descriptions.ja: K8s Pod restart は CheckpointRestoreEvent ではない。

descriptions.zh: CheckpointRestoreEvent 记录 restore 发生；RestoreActivity 是执行 restore 的 Activity；事件与 Activity 分开保存。
descriptions.en: CheckpointRestoreEvent records restore occurrence; RestoreActivity is Activity performing restore; save event and Activity separately.
descriptions.ja: RestoreEvent と RestoreActivity は分離保存する。

labels.zh: HITL approve 后 restore 实例
labels.ja: HITL approve 後 restore 事例

descriptions.zh: HITL approve 后 CheckpointRestoreEvent event_id=restore-61、thread_id=thread-1、restored_checkpoint_id=1f070a87...、restored_at=2026-01-15T10:30:00Z。
descriptions.en: After HITL approve, CheckpointRestoreEvent event_id=restore-61, thread_id=thread-1, restored_checkpoint_id=1f070a87..., restored_at=2026-01-15T10:30:00Z.
descriptions.ja: HITL approve 後 restore-61 CheckpointRestoreEvent を記録する。

labels.zh: Docker 镜像 digest 固定
labels.ja: Docker イメージ digest 固定

descriptions.zh: Docker docker run python:3.12-slim@sha256:abc123... 固定 Container image_digest=sha256:abc123、container_id=cr-11，作为 agent worker 运行环境。
descriptions.en: Docker docker run python:3.12-slim@sha256:abc123... pins Container image_digest=sha256:abc123, container_id=cr-11 as agent worker runtime.
descriptions.ja: Docker digest 固定 Container が worker 環境である。

labels.ja: Kubernetes Pod name は Container ではない

descriptions.zh: Kubernetes Pod metadata.name=worker-7 无 image digest/容器/filesystem 边界，不是 Moonweave Container 记录。
descriptions.en: Kubernetes Pod metadata.name=worker-7 without image digest/container/filesystem boundary is not Moonweave Container record.
descriptions.ja: Pod name だけでは Container 記録にならない。

descriptions.zh: Container 是瞬态执行载体；Artifact 是稳定 content digest 输出；Docker 容器 ID 不是 Artifact。
descriptions.en: Container is transient execution carrier; Artifact is stable content digest output; Docker container ID is not Artifact.
descriptions.ja: Container は実行载体、Artifact は出力 Entity である。

descriptions.zh: Container container_id=cr-11、image_ref=python:3.12-slim、image_digest=sha256:abc123、c runtime_started_at=2026-01-15T08:00:00Z。
descriptions.en: Container container_id=cr-11, image_ref=python:3.12-slim, image_digest=sha256:abc123, runtime_started_at=2026-01-15T08:00:00Z.
descriptions.ja: cr-11 python:3.12-slim Container を記録する。

labels.zh: Cursor IDE 开发者触发 agent
labels.ja: Cursor IDE 開発者が agent を起動

descriptions.zh: Cursor IDE 开发者打开 Chat session_id=cursor-agent-session-77 触发 agent run，映射 DeveloperRole role_id=developer-role、developer_id=dev-bob。
descriptions.en: Cursor IDE developer opens Chat session_id=cursor-agent-session-77 triggering agent run mapping DeveloperRole role_id=developer-role, developer_id=dev-bob.
descriptions.ja: Cursor Chat 起動が DeveloperRole である。

labels.ja: git commit author は DeveloperRole ではない

descriptions.zh: git commit author=dev-bob 是 VCS 元数据，不是运行时 DeveloperRole Activity 证据。
descriptions.en: git commit author=dev-bob is VCS metadata, not runtime DeveloperRole Activity evidence.
descriptions.ja: git author は DeveloperRole ではない。

descriptions.zh: DeveloperRole 是 IDE/开发场景触发 agent 的 role；HumanOperatorRole 是 HITL 审批；developer 触发 run，operator 审批 run。
descriptions.en: DeveloperRole is IDE/dev scenario triggering agent role; HumanOperatorRole is HITL approval; developer triggers run, operator approves run.
descriptions.ja: DeveloperRole は run 起動、HumanOperatorRole は承認である。

descriptions.zh: DeveloperRole role_id=developer-role、developer_id=dev-bob、session_id=cursor-agent-session-77、triggered_at=2026-01-15T08:30:00Z。
descriptions.en: DeveloperRole role_id=developer-role, developer_id=dev-bob, session_id=cursor-agent-session-77, triggered_at=2026-01-15T08:30:00Z.
descriptions.ja: developer-role Cursor セッションを記録する。

labels.zh: OpenAI Assistants Run 生命周期
labels.ja: OpenAI Assistants Run ライフサイクル

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Assistants API 中，通过 client.beta.threads.runs.create(thread_id=thread_id, assistant_id=assistant_id) 创建 Run。Run 对象包含 id、status、started_at、completed_at 等字段。状态流转为 queued → in_progress → requires_action（如需工具调用）→ completed/failed/cancelled/expired。每个 Run 产生 Run Steps，步骤类型为 message_creation 或 tool_calls。可通过 client.beta.threads.runs.steps.list(thread_id, run_id) 查询所有步骤。
descriptions.en: In OpenAI Assistants API, create a Run via client.beta.threads.runs.create(thread_id, assistant_id). Run object contains id, status, started_at, completed_at fields. Status flow is queued → in_progress → requires_action → completed/failed/cancelled/expired. Each Run produces Run Steps of type message_creation or tool_calls.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI Assistants API で runs.create により Run を作成。status は queued→in_progress→requires_action→completed 等。Run Steps は message_creation または tool_calls。

labels.ja: LangGraph コンパイル済みグラフは Execution ではない

descriptions.zh: LangGraph StateGraph.compile() 后仅有节点/边定义；graph.invoke 调用前 planner 输出的 TaskStep 列表是 PROV prov:Plan，缺少 execution_id、started_at 与 RunAttempt 证据。
descriptions.en: After LangGraph StateGraph.compile(), only node/edge definitions exist; before graph.invoke, planner TaskStep list is PROV prov:Plan without execution_id, started_at, or RunAttempt evidence.
descriptions.ja: graph.invoke 前の TaskStep 一覧は prov:Plan であり execution_id も started_at もない。

labels.zh: LangSmith 子 run 与 Execution 边界
labels.ja: LangSmith 子 run と Execution 境界

descriptions.zh: LangSmith RunTree 中 llm.generate（parent_run_id=agent.run）与 tool.execute 是 TraceSpan 子操作；agent.run 根 run 才对应一次完整 agent Execution，子 run 不得提升为 Execution。
descriptions.en: In LangSmith RunTree, llm.generate (parent_run_id=agent.run) and tool.execute are TraceSpan child operations; only agent.run root maps to one full agent Execution.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith 子 run（llm.generate）は TraceSpan であり、根 run のみが Execution に対応する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph graph.invoke(input, config={configurable:{thread_id:thread-1}}) 在 2026-08-03T20:28:43Z 开始、20:28:46Z 结束；每个 super-step 调用 checkpointer.put；LangSmith 导出 trace_id 与 Execution 关联。

descriptions.ja: LangGraph graph.invoke は super-step ごとに checkpoint を書き、LangSmith trace と相関する。

descriptions.ja: a2a-card-review RemoteAgentReference を記録する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph graph.invoke(None, config={"configurable":{"thread_id":"thread-1","checkpoint_id":"1f070a87..."}}) time-travel ReplayActivity 重放历史 super-step 而非继续 forward。
descriptions.en: LangGraph graph.invoke(None, config={"configurable":{"thread_id":"thread-1","checkpoint_id":"1f070a87..."}}) time-travel ReplayActivity re-enacts historical super-step rather than continuing forward.
descriptions.ja: time-travel invoke が ReplayActivity として歴史 super-step を再演する。

labels.zh: 单元测试 mock 非 ReplayActivity
labels.ja: ユニットテスト mock は ReplayActivity ではない

descriptions.zh: pytest mock graph.invoke 无 checkpoint_id/thread 生产证据，不是 ReplayActivity。
descriptions.en: pytest mock graph.invoke without checkpoint_id/thread production evidence is not ReplayActivity.
descriptions.ja: pytest mock は ReplayActivity ではない。

descriptions.zh: ReplayActivity 重放历史；RestoreActivity 从 checkpoint 继续 forward；replay 用 checkpoint_id 定位历史点。
descriptions.en: ReplayActivity re-enacts history; RestoreActivity continues forward from checkpoint; replay uses checkpoint_id to locate historical point.
descriptions.ja: Replay は再演、Restore は forward 継続である。

labels.zh: 历史 checkpoint replay 实例
labels.ja: 履歴 checkpoint replay 事例

descriptions.zh: ReplayActivity activity_id=replay-45、checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336、thread_id=thread-1、replayed_at=2026-01-15T11:05:00Z。
descriptions.en: ReplayActivity activity_id=replay-45, checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336, thread_id=thread-1, replayed_at=2026-01-15T11:05:00Z.
descriptions.ja: replay-45 が履歴 checkpoint を replay する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph graph.invoke(None, config={"configurable":{"thread_id":"thread-1","checkpoint_id":"1f070a87..."}}) time-travel 产生 ReplayEvent，重放历史 super-step 状态。
descriptions.en: LangGraph graph.invoke(None, config={"configurable":{"thread_id":"thread-1","checkpoint_id":"1f070a87..."}}) time-travel produces ReplayEvent replaying historical super-step state.
descriptions.ja: LangGraph time-travel invoke が ReplayEvent を生成する。

labels.ja: LangSmith playground は ReplayEvent ではない

descriptions.zh: LangSmith playground 重跑 prompt 无 checkpoint_id/thread 证据，不是 LangGraph ReplayEvent。
descriptions.en: LangSmith playground re-run prompt lacks checkpoint_id/thread evidence, not LangGraph ReplayEvent.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith playground は ReplayEvent ではない。

descriptions.zh: ReplayEvent 是观测到的 replay 发生事件；ReplayActivity 是 PROV Activity 执行 replay 操作；事件记录 occurrence，Activity 记录 work。
descriptions.en: ReplayEvent is observed replay occurrence event; ReplayActivity is PROV Activity performing replay; event records occurrence, Activity records work.
descriptions.ja: ReplayEvent は occurrence、ReplayActivity は Activity である。

labels.zh: checkpoint 历史 replay 实例
labels.ja: checkpoint 履歴 replay 事例

descriptions.zh: ReplayEvent event_id=replay-65、checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336、thread_id=thread-1、replayed_at=2026-01-15T11:00:00Z。
descriptions.en: ReplayEvent event_id=replay-65, checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336, thread_id=thread-1, replayed_at=2026-01-15T11:00:00Z.
descriptions.ja: ReplayEvent replay-65 を checkpoint 履歴 replay として記録する。

labels.ja: LangSmith run.outputs は ReportArtifact ではない

descriptions.zh: LangSmith run.outputs={"summary":"..."} 是 trace 预览，无 content_digest 与独立检索，不是 ReportArtifact Entity。
descriptions.en: LangSmith run.outputs={"summary":"..."} is trace preview without content_digest and independent retrieval, not ReportArtifact Entity.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith outputs は ReportArtifact ではない。

descriptions.zh: ReportArtifact 是 narrative/report 文本输出；ExportArtifact 是 CI/打包导出；research report 与 build artifact 用途不同。
descriptions.en: ReportArtifact is narrative/report text output; ExportArtifact is CI/package export; research report and build artifact differ in purpose.
descriptions.ja: ReportArtifact と ExportArtifact は用途が異なる。

descriptions.zh: ReportArtifact artifact_id=report-22、media_type=text/markdown、word_count=1800、generated_by=review-exec-842。
descriptions.en: ReportArtifact artifact_id=report-22, media_type=text/markdown, word_count=1800, generated_by=review-exec-842.

descriptions.zh: Cohere rerank(model=, query="...", documents=[...]) 在 LangSmith tool run name=rerank 中映射 RerankerModel model_id=model-r-2、top_n=5。
descriptions.en: Cohere rerank(model=, query="...", documents=[...]) in LangSmith tool run name=rerank maps RerankerModel model_id=model-r-2, top_n=5.
descriptions.ja: Cohere rerank-v3 が RerankerModel である。

labels.ja: sort() ローカルソートは RerankerModel ではない

descriptions.en: Python sorted(docs, key=score) is local sorting logic, not Cohere RerankerModel asset.
descriptions.ja: sorted() は RerankerModel ではない。

descriptions.zh: RerankerModel 是 rerank 模型资产；EmbeddingModel 是向量模型；retriever pipeline 可先后引用两者。
descriptions.en: RerankerModel is rerank model asset; EmbeddingModel is vector model; retriever pipeline may reference both sequentially.
descriptions.ja: RerankerModel と EmbeddingModel は別資産である。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph graph.get_state(config={configurable:{thread_id:thread-1}}) 在 interrupt 后 RestoreActivity 读取 checkpoint values/next 准备 resume。
descriptions.en: LangGraph graph.get_state(config={configurable:{thread_id:thread-1}}) after interrupt RestoreActivity reads checkpoint values/next preparing resume.
descriptions.ja: interrupt 後 get_state が RestoreActivity として checkpoint を読む。

labels.ja: OpenAI Thread 読込は RestoreActivity ではない

descriptions.zh: OpenAI client.beta.threads.messages.list(thread_id) 加载对话历史是 RuntimeSession 操作，不是 LangGraph RestoreActivity。
descriptions.en: OpenAI client.beta.threads.messages.list(thread_id) loading conversation history is RuntimeSession operation, not LangGraph RestoreActivity.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI Thread messages.list は RuntimeSession 操作である。

descriptions.zh: RestoreActivity 读取 checkpoint 恢复执行上下文；ReplayActivity 重放历史 super-step；restore 继续，replay 重演。
descriptions.en: RestoreActivity reads checkpoint restoring execution context; ReplayActivity replays historical super-step; restore continues, replay re-enacts.
descriptions.ja: Restore は継続、Replay は再演である。

descriptions.zh: RestoreActivity activity_id=restore-44、checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336、thread_id=thread-1、restored_at=2026-01-15T10:20:00Z。
descriptions.en: RestoreActivity activity_id=restore-44, checkpoint_id=1f070a87-33b3-6d36-8001-50c306580336, thread_id=thread-1, restored_at=2026-01-15T10:20:00Z.
descriptions.ja: restore-44 が interrupt 後 checkpoint を復元する。

descriptions.zh: Run status=requires_action 且 required_action.type=submit_tool_outputs 时，client.beta.threads.runs.submit_tool_outputs(thread_id, run_id, tool_outputs=[{tool_call_id:, output:}]) 创建 RetryActivity。
descriptions.en: When Run status=requires_action with required_action.type=submit_tool_outputs, client.beta.threads.runs.submit_tool_outputs(thread_id, run_id, tool_outputs) creates RetryActivity.
descriptions.ja: submit_tool_outputs は RetryActivity として工具出力提交を記録する。

descriptions.zh: LangGraph RetryPolicy(max_attempts=3) 在节点失败时自动重试；框架内部循环若无显式 retry 决策记录，不应创建 Moonweave RetryActivity。
descriptions.en: LangGraph RetryPolicy(max_attempts=3) auto-retries on node failure; internal retry loop without explicit retry decision record should not create Moonweave RetryActivity.
descriptions.ja: LangGraph RetryPolicy の内部ループだけでは RetryActivity を作成しない。

labels.zh: Temporal signal 与 RetryActivity 边界
labels.ja: Temporal signal と RetryActivity 境界

descriptions.zh: Temporal workflow.signal(', payload) 是 Workflow 外部信号；OpenAI submit_tool_outputs 才是 Assistants 栈上可映射的 RetryActivity 证据。
descriptions.en: Temporal workflow.signal(', payload) is external Workflow signal; OpenAI submit_tool_outputs is mappable RetryActivity evidence on Assistants stack.
descriptions.ja: Temporal signal と OpenAI submit_tool_outputs は異なる Retry 証拠モデルである。

labels.ja: CrewAI kickoff 失敗後再実行

descriptions.zh: Crew.kickoff() 第一次因 tool 超时失败；运维手动第二次 kickoff() 前记录 RetryActivity retry_reason=tool_timeout，随后 RunAttempt attempt_number=2 开始。
descriptions.en: First Crew.kickoff() fails on tool timeout; before manual second kickoff(), RetryActivity retry_reason=tool_timeout is recorded, then RunAttempt attempt_number=2 starts.
descriptions.ja: Crew.kickoff 失敗後 RetryActivity を記録してから 2 回目 RunAttempt を開始する。

labels.zh: CrewAI Data Analysis Specialist 审查
labels.ja: CrewAI Data Analysis Specialist レビュー

descriptions.zh: CrewAI crafting-effective-agents 指南：Agent(role=) 承担审查分析任务，映射 ReviewerRole role_id=reviewer-role。
descriptions.en: CrewAI crafting-effective-agents guide: Agent(role=) performs review analysis mapping ReviewerRole role_id=reviewer-role.
descriptions.ja: CrewAI Data Analysis Specialist が ReviewerRole である。

labels.ja: GitHub CODEOWNERS は ReviewerRole ではない

descriptions.zh: GitHub CODEOWNERS @team-review 是仓库治理配置，不是运行时 ReviewerRole Activity 证据。
descriptions.en: GitHub CODEOWNERS @team-review is repository governance config, not runtime ReviewerRole Activity evidence.
descriptions.ja: CODEOWNERS は ReviewerRole ではない。

descriptions.zh: ReviewerRole 是审查 runtime role 定义；HumanActor 是承担审查的人；SoftwareActor AgentActor 是可自动化审查 agent。
descriptions.en: ReviewerRole is review runtime role definition; HumanActor is person performing review; SoftwareActor AgentActor is automatable review agent.
descriptions.ja: ReviewerRole/HumanActor/AgentActor は層が異なる。

descriptions.zh: ReviewerRole role_id=reviewer-role、label="Data Analysis Specialist"、bound_actor=human-reviewer-1、task_scope=review-exec-842。
descriptions.en: ReviewerRole role_id=reviewer-role, label="Data Analysis Specialist", bound_actor=human-reviewer-1, task_scope=review-exec-842.
descriptions.ja: reviewer-role ReviewerRole を記録する。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI runs.retrieve(thread_id, run_id) 返回 status=in_progress、started_at=2026-01-08T12:00:03Z；RunAttempt attempt_number=1、outcome=running 记录首次执行窗口，与 Execution.state 同步。
descriptions.en: OpenAI runs.retrieve(thread_id, run_id) returns status=in_progress, started_at=2026-01-08T12:00:03Z; RunAttempt attempt_number=1, outcome=running records first execution window synchronized with Execution.state.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI Run in_progress を RunAttempt attempt_number=1 として記録する。

labels.zh: 不可变违反：改写失败尝试
labels.ja: 不変性違反：失敗試行の書き換え

descriptions.zh: 运维脚本将 RunAttempt attempt_number=1 的 outcome 从 failed UPDATE 为 succeeded；LangGraph fault-tolerance 要求每次 try 为不可变 Activity，应新建 attempt_number=2。
descriptions.en: Ops script UPDATEs RunAttempt attempt_number=1 outcome from failed to succeeded; LangGraph fault-tolerance requires each try as immutable Activity—create attempt_number=2 instead.
descriptions.ja: 失敗 RunAttempt を UPDATE せず attempt_number=2 を新規作成する。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI submit_tool_outputs 触发 RetryActivity（重新排队决策）；新 RunAttempt attempt_number=2 记录第二次 in_progress 窗口，RetryActivity 不替代 Attempt 记录。
descriptions.en: OpenAI submit_tool_outputs triggers RetryActivity (re-queue decision); new RunAttempt attempt_number=2 records second in_progress window; RetryActivity does not replace Attempt record.
descriptions.ja: RetryActivity は判断、RunAttempt は各試行窗口を記録する。

descriptions.zh: Run run_qVYsWok6 在 requires_action 后第二次 in_progress：RunAttempt attempt_id=openai-run-attempt-2、attempt_number=2、started_at=2026-01-08T12:00:05Z、outcome=completed。
descriptions.en: Run run_qVYsWok6 enters in_progress again after requires_action: RunAttempt attempt_id=openai-run-attempt-2, attempt_number=2, started_at=2026-01-08T12:00:05Z, outcome=completed.
descriptions.ja: requires_action 後の 2 回目 RunAttempt を attempt_number=2 として記録する。

labels.zh: OpenAI triage Agent 参与者平面
labels.ja: OpenAI triage Agent アクター平面

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent、booking_agent、refund_agent 映射 SoftwareActor/AgentActor；HumanOperatorRole 审批绑定 ActorRoleBinding；MCP ToolServiceActor 执行 tools/call。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK triage_agent, booking_agent, refund_agent map to SoftwareActor/AgentActor; HumanOperatorRole approval binds ActorRoleBinding; MCP ToolServiceActor executes tools/call.
descriptions.ja: OpenAI handoffs + MCP tools が runtime-actors 平面を構成する。

labels.ja: LangSmith run_id を Actor とする

descriptions.en: Writing LangSmith run_id to actor_id treats trace observation as responsible principal; run is TraceSpan not PROV Agent.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith run_id を actor_id に書くのは誤りである。

descriptions.zh: Actor 是 PROV 责任主体；TraceSpan 是 OTel 操作投影；telemetry 可关联 actor_id 但 span 不能替代 Actor。
descriptions.en: Actor is PROV responsible principal; TraceSpan is OTel operation projection; telemetry may correlate actor_id but span cannot replace Actor.
descriptions.ja: Actor と TraceSpan は別概念である。

labels.zh: CrewAI 多角色 Actor 实例
labels.ja: CrewAI マルチロール Actor 事例

descriptions.zh: CrewAI Crew(agents=[researcher, writer]) kickoff() 归因 Actor actor_id=crewai-journalist 与 ReviewerRole；GenerativeModel gpt-4o 由 ModelActor 引用。
descriptions.en: CrewAI Crew(agents=[researcher, writer]) kickoff() attributes Actor actor_id=crewai-journalist and ReviewerRole; GenerativeModel gpt-4o referenced by ModelActor.
descriptions.ja: CrewAI kickoff が複数 Actor/Role を归因する。

descriptions.en: A2A Protocol v0.3 Artifact: artifactId=a1, name=itinerary, parts=[TextPart, DataPart], index=0 (a2a-protocol.org/specification).
descriptions.ja: A2A Artifact artifactId=a1 が PROV Entity である。

labels.zh: Docker 容器 ID 非 Artifact
labels.ja: Docker container ID は Artifact ではない

descriptions.en: Docker container sha256:abc123 identifies runtime Container environment, not stable content digest Artifact output.
descriptions.ja: Docker container ID は Artifact ではない。

descriptions.zh: LangSmith run.outputs 是 trace 输出预览；Artifact 需 content_digest 与独立检索；trace preview 不是 PROV Entity。
descriptions.en: LangSmith run.outputs is trace output preview; Artifact needs content_digest and independent retrieval; trace preview is not PROV Entity.
descriptions.ja: LangSmith outputs は trace 証拠、Artifact は Entity である。

descriptions.ja: GitHub Actions artifact が ExportArtifact である。

descriptions.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK Runner.run(agent, max_turns=10) 在启动前写入 RuntimeBudget budget_kind=max_turns、limit=10；超出时抛出 MaxTurnsExceeded。
descriptions.en: OpenAI Agents SDK Runner.run(agent, max_turns=10) writes RuntimeBudget budget_kind=max_turns, limit=10 before start; exceeding raises MaxTurnsExceeded.
descriptions.ja: Runner.run(max_turns=10) は RuntimeBudget limit=10 を書き、超過時 MaxTurnsExceeded を投げる。

labels.ja: max_tokens 単一呼び出し参数

descriptions.zh: OpenAI chat.completions max_tokens=4096 是单次模型调用参数，不是 Execution 级 RuntimeBudget；缺少 budget_kind 与 execution 引用时不建模。
descriptions.en: OpenAI chat.completions max_tokens=4096 is single-call parameter, not Execution-level RuntimeBudget; without budget_kind and execution reference, do not model.
descriptions.ja: max_tokens=4096 は単一 API 呼び出し参数であり Execution 级 RuntimeBudget ではない。

descriptions.zh: Temporal StartWorkflowOptions.WorkflowExecutionTimeout=30m 是 Workflow 级超时；OpenAI max_turns 是轮次预算；budget_kind 必须区分 workflow_timeout 与 max_turns。
descriptions.en: Temporal WorkflowExecutionTimeout=30m is workflow-level timeout; OpenAI max_turns is turn budget; budget_kind must distinguish workflow_timeout vs max_turns.
descriptions.ja: Temporal timeout と OpenAI max_turns は budget_kind を分けて RuntimeBudget にマップする。

descriptions.zh: CrewAI Agent(max_iter=15) 在 Crew.kickoff() 前写入 RuntimeBudget budget_kind=max_iterations、limit=15；第 15 次迭代后停止并记录 Execution outcome=completed。
descriptions.en: CrewAI Agent(max_iter=15) writes RuntimeBudget budget_kind=max_iterations, limit=15 before Crew.kickoff(); stops after iteration 15 with Execution outcome=completed.
descriptions.ja: CrewAI max_iter=15 を RuntimeBudget として kickoff 前に記録する。

descriptions.zh: Cursor devcontainer.json + Docker image python:3.12 + LangGraph thread_id=thread-1 构成 RuntimeEnvironment env_id=env-prod-a，含 Container、ProcessHandle、WorkingDirectory。
descriptions.en: Cursor devcontainer.json + Docker image python:3.12 + LangGraph thread_id=thread-1 forms RuntimeEnvironment env_id=env-prod-a with Container, ProcessHandle, WorkingDirectory.
